task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS S3 bucket policy that allows public read access to all objects
solution_criteria: Valid JSON with proper S3 bucket policy structure, Principal set to '*', Action set to 's3:GetObject', Effect set to 'Allow', and Resource pointing to all objects in the bucket

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS CloudWatch log message and extracts the timestamp and error code using a single regex pattern
solution_criteria: Function accepts a log string, uses a single regex pattern to extract timestamp and error code, returns a tuple or dict with both values, handles edge cases gracefully

task: Create a regular expression that validates AWS IAM role ARN format (arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name)
solution_criteria: Regex correctly matches valid IAM role ARNs, validates account-id as 12 digits, allows alphanumeric characters and hyphens in role names, rejects invalid formats
